# QuickBeak

> QuickBeak is a single-file, offline-first, privacy-first issue tracker for indie
> developers and makers. Drop bugs, suggestions, and feedback as you build. A local
> AI cleans up your notes (text never leaves your machine), and everything syncs
> through a Google Sheet you own. No server, no subscription - one-time $1 for Pro.

QuickBeak is one HTML file you open in any browser. Your data lives in your own
browser and, optionally, a Google Sheet in your own Google account - never on our
servers. Bring your own AI provider (Ollama, OpenAI-compatible, Gemini, Odysseus,
OpenRouter, or any local model) so note cleanup stays private. Free to use,
including commercially; you may not resell, embed, or redistribute it.

## Install
- [Windows (PowerShell)](https://quickbeak.com/install.ps1): `irm https://quickbeak.com/install.ps1 | iex`
- [macOS / Linux](https://quickbeak.com/install.sh): `curl -fsSL https://quickbeak.com/install.sh | sh`
- [Open the app directly](https://quickbeak.com/QuickBeak.html)

## Key facts
- Single HTML file, runs offline, no install bloat (delete the file to uninstall).
- Privacy-first: no server, no tracking, no telemetry; data stays in your browser / your own Google account.
- Local-AI "Magic Tidy" cleans rough notes into a tidy bug/suggestion/feedback entry.
- Sync via a Google Sheet you own (Apps Script); no account with us.
- Pricing: Free now; Pro is a one-time $1 (never a subscription); Team is $1 per seat.
- Platforms: any modern browser (PWA on phones), Windows/macOS/Linux desktop builds for Pro.
